query: sodium vapor street light orange yellow night photograph
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / sickly_cast — sodium vapor street light cast, orange/yellow night tint

response.objective_caption: A nighttime panoramic view of a sprawling city seen from an elevated vantage point. Numerous small lights from streets and buildings dot the distant horizon beneath a dark sky. Dense dark trees form silhouettes along the right side and lower foreground, with faint terrain visible far in the distance.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime panoramic view of a sprawling city seen from an elevated vantage point, inundated by a sickly orange sodium-vapor cast that tints the sky and landscape in an unnatural hue. Numerous small lights from streets and buildings dot the distant horizon, yet the image suffers from low-contrast oppressive tonality that crushes the dark silhouettes of dense trees along the right side and foreground into the glowing haze, producing a heavy, suffocating atmosphere.
